productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Bess Bp Black Backpacks
description: Stylish and spacious, the adidas BESS BP backpack makes for a great carry to the gym, carry your baby’s stuff when on a shopping spree, and of course to work and college too. Capacity: 6kgMade of 100% polyester with a 100% polyester shell for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bagOne main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a separatorTwo mesh organizers on either sides Twill tape haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable padded handles for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomically padded back for carrying comfort Printed branding with piping in sliver on the front for styleCare only hand washClean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wringLine dry Do not iron
